across.clue: To move more slowly than other people so that you are behind them. | fall ___
To alert someone is to tell or warn that person about something.
Caution is care and attention in order to avoid danger.
to go down a mountain or slope or to go downstairs.
To resent something means to have bad feelings about it.
an excellent painting book piece of music etc or the best work of art that a particular artist writer musician etc has ever produced
To oblige someone means to require them to do something.
If something is private, it is only used by one person or group.

down.clue: Hidden means not easily noticed or too hard to find.
Deluxe means of higher quality than usual.
If a problem or someone's behavior baffles you you cannot understand it or solve it.
Custody is the right to take care of someone or something.
To disappear means to go away or not be seen.
Overweight people or animals are heavier than is healthy.
A person’s metabolism is the way chemical processes in their body use energy.
To recognize something is to know it because you have seen it before.
An empire is a large group of countries ruled by an emperor or empress.
A monastery is a building in which monks live.
A punishment is something that one must endure for any wrongdoing.
To render something means to make it become something else.
